overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a medieval great hall from a Harry Potter video game, featuring floating candles, blue house banners, and students dining at long tables. Warm sunlight streams through tall stained-glass windows as the player enters through large wooden doors and walks the central aisle.

events.description: large wooden doors swing open revealing the candlelit great hall interior

agents.ego_description: pushing open the carved wooden doors and stepping into the grand hall

entered.detail: large carved wooden door with intricate floral patterns and metal studs
gothic stone archway framing the entrance

segments.scene_description: The clip begins with a close view of an ornate carved wooden door which opens to reveal the vast interior of a medieval great hall. The camera moves from the dimly lit enclosed doorway into the bright, candlelit space beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall central aisle with house tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central aisle between rows of dining tables

notable_agents.action: students in robes sitting at long tables eating and conversing
students seated at dining tables with food and drink

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
dark blue banners with house emblems hanging from the ceiling
long wooden benches and tables lined with dining students
rows of house tables with food platters and golden tableware
tall arched windows with colorful glass panels at the far end
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
arched stone pillars lining the sides of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down the central aisle of the vast gothic great hall, with floating candles and blue house banners overhead. Students in school robes sit at long wooden tables on both sides eating and socializing, while warm morning light streams through the tall stained-glass windows at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the front staff table area

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the ceiling banners and floating candles

agents.ego_description: looking up at the ceiling decorations while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: ornate wooden ceiling structure with stone arches high above
elevated table at the front of the hall for faculty

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the front of the hall, it tilts upward to admire the blue banners and floating candles against the vaulted wooden ceiling. The perspective shifts to show the staff table ahead before the camera returns to level view.

scene_state.functional_zone: front staff table and side house tables

events.description: camera turns left toward the side tables and moves closer to the students

agents.ego_description: turning toward the left side tables and approaching students for potential interaction

notable_agents.action: student sitting at table with food, showing interaction prompt

entered.detail: plates of food including fruits and bread on the table
ornate golden drinking vessels on the dining table
decorative heraldic shields mounted on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the front of the hall near the elevated staff table, then turns left to approach the side house tables. Moving close to the students, the view shows detailed food platters and golden goblets on the table, with a game UI prompt appearing to indicate interaction with a nearby student.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed entryway into the expansive, light-filled grandeur of a medieval great hall. It begins with a close view of an ornate carved wooden door that opens to reveal the vast interior, moving the perspective from the shadows of the doorway into a bright, candlelit space. As the camera proceeds down the central aisle, the view expands to show students in robes dining at long wooden tables beneath floating candles and blue house banners, while warm morning light streams through distant stained-glass windows. The scene then shifts as the camera tilts upward to admire the vaulted wooden ceiling and the banners above before leveling out to face the elevated staff table. Finally, the camera turns left to approach the side tables, moving close to the detailed food platters and golden goblets as a game UI prompt appears for a nearby student.
